falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: Maybe the run intentionally stays running so later retries can still recover exhausted targets.
falsificationQueries: Inspect run_service terminal error policy for nonterminal stages
Inspect process_request_targets resolution and retry ceiling
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: The run stays running because the code only terminalizes when completed == 0 and failed > 0, not because there is pending repair work. The representative failed target is already exhausted with no pending work.
